name: @skelm/workflow-debugger
description: Ingest a failed run and produce a redacted debug report with a reviewable remediation.

workflows.description: Analyze a failed run (events/audit/artifacts) and identify the failing step.

config.tokenRef: Name of the env var holding the gateway bearer token.

secrets.name: SKELM_GATEWAY_TOKEN
secrets.description: Bearer token for the gateway run/audit/artifact HTTP API, by reference.
